title: Sendinblue vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Sendinblue vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Sendinblue and Privy comes down to your specific use case. Sendinblue is built for transactional email and SMS campaigns, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and SMS campaigns
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Sendinblue wins for transactional email and SMS campaigns, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Sendinblue or Privy?
faq.a: Sendinblue starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to Sendinblue?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
